scene: Stan the round-headed dot-eyed stickman with a big empty thought bubble over his head, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps GUESS YOUR NEXT THOUGHT.
A sandwich popping into Stan's thought bubble out of nowhere with motion lines, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps WHERE FROM.
Stan sitting like a reader watching thoughts appear on a screen in front of him, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps YOU ARE READING IT.
A question-mark cloud mailing a little letter down into Stan's head, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps WHO SENT IT.
Stan looking warily at a separate speech bubble talking beside his own head, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps WHO IS TALKING.
